---
title: "Vignette"
author: "hec and nikki"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
source("R/my_functions.R")

# Define the GitHub link
github_url <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hjleon19/collaborative-project/refs/heads/master/S3%20Table.txt"

# Step 1: Load data from the URL instead of the local path
deg <- load_deg_table(github_url)

# Step 2: Volcano plot
volcano_plot(
  data = deg,
  logFC = "logFC",
  pval = "padj",
  alpha = 0.05,
  lfc_thresh = 1,
  already_adjusted = TRUE,
  title = "Volcano Plot: vEDS vs Controls"
)

# Step 3: Heatmap
heatmap_plot(deg = deg, title = "Hierarchical Clustering of DEGs")
```

```{r}
source("R/my_functions.R")

# Step 1: Load DEG table
deg <- load_deg_table(
  "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hjleon19/collaborative-project/refs/heads/master/S3%20Table.txt"
)

# Step 4: PPI Network
ppi_network(
  deg             = deg,
  score_threshold = 400,
  title           = "PPI Network of DEGs: vEDS vs Controls"
)
```

\

```{r}
deg <- load_deg_table(
  "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hjleon19/collaborative-project/refs/heads/master/S3%20Table.txt"
)


# Basic usage - top 30 hubs at medium confidence
hub_result <- ppi_hub_network(
  deg   = deg,
  title = "Top 30 Hub Proteins: vEDS vs Controls"
)

# Top 20 at high confidence only
hub_result <- ppi_hub_network(
  deg             = deg,
  score_threshold = 700,
  top_n           = 20,
  title           = "Top 20 High-Confidence Hub Proteins"
)

# Up-regulated hubs only
hub_result <- ppi_hub_network(
  deg   = deg[deg$logFC > 0, ],
  top_n = 20,
  title = "Top 20 Up-regulated Hub Proteins"
)

# Down-regulated hubs only
hub_result <- ppi_hub_network(
  deg   = deg[deg$logFC < 0, ],
  top_n = 20,
  title = "Top 20 Down-regulated Hub Proteins"
)
```

\
\
